svg.title: Bad data detection and triage flow
svg.desc: Flowchart showing how a raw file or Kinesis event moves through Lambda file_validator DQ checks, with bad records routed to SQS FIFO quarantine queue and quarantine_index DynamoDB, and valid records continuing to Bronze Delta.

g.text: Runs DQ checks on every record — partial batch support
DynamoDB — one row per bad record
HIPAA audit trail — JSON per file
DynamoDB — registers column schema per dataset
